1→import {

Perfect. Now I have comprehensive data. Let me compile the complete inventory report.

---

## COMPLETE SCREENS INVENTORY REPORT

### 1. SCREENS DIRECTORY STRUCTURE (11 screens)

#### **Points Management** (3 screens)
- **/src/screens/Points/**
  - Purpose: Main points balance display hub with redemption options
  - DS Components: `Box`, `CardActivity`, `CardPoints`, `Text`
  - Features: Points balance display, "where to use" marketplace grid, learn more section, my orders toggle

- **/src/screens/PointsDetail/**
  - Purpose: Individual transaction detail with origin/vehicle info
  - DS Components: `BackDropBottom`, `Box`, `Button`, `CardActivity`, `DetailTransactionValue`, `SeparatorHorizontal`, `TagLabel`, `Text`
  - Features: Transaction details, origin/tag/purchase type info, "report problem" support modal with phone numbers

- **/src/screens/ExtractRewardProgram/**
  - Purpose: Full transaction history with search and filters
  - DS Components: `Box`, `CardPoints`, `Icon`, `ListCardTransition`, `LoadingFooter`, `SearchUsed`, `SeparatorHorizontal`, `Tabs`, `Text`
  - Features: Points available summary, transaction list with tabs (Todos/A expirar), search functionality, advanced filtering, pull-to-refresh

#### **Cashback on Invoice** (3 screens)
- **/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackOnboarding/**
  - Purpose: Cashback feature onboarding/education screen
  - DS Components: `Box`, `Button`, `ListTextIcon`, `Text`
  - Features: List of benefits, call-to-action to continue to points/reais selection

- **/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/**
  - Purpose: Define cashback amount in points and reais with conversion rate
  - DS Components: `BackDropBottom`, `Box`, `Button`, `Icon`, `InputBox`, `ListTextIcon`, `Text`
  - Features: Points input with "use all" option, reais input, live conversion display, help modal with explanations

- **/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/**
  - Purpose: Confirm cashback details and show success/failure result
  - DS Components: `Alert`, `BackDropBottom`, `Box`, `Button`, `Icon`, `ListTextIcon`, `Loading`, `SeparatorHorizontal`, `Text`
  - Features: Review screen with points/reais breakdown, confirmation button, loading state, success/failure result screens (72h timeline alert)

#### **Marketplace** (2 screens)
- **/src/screens/RewardProgramMarketplace/**
  - Purpose: WebView-based shopping/voucher redemption marketplace
  - DS Components: `Box`, `Loading`
  - Features: WebView wrapper with error handling, loading state, native web integrations

- **/src/screens/AirlineMilesMarketplace/**
  - Purpose: WebView-based airline miles redemption partner
  - DS Components: None directly (uses template components)
  - Features: Loading animation, error boundary, WebView render

#### **Orders & Support** (2 screens)
- **/src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/**
  - Purpose: List of redeemed vouchers/orders with status
  - DS Components: `Box`, `CardVehicleTags`, `Image`, `Skeleton`, `Text`
  - Features: Filterable order list, refresh control, skeleton loading, empty state with guidance, status-based filtering

- **/src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/**
  - Purpose: Individual order/redemption detail with marketplace info
  - DS Components: `Alert`, `BackDropBottom`, `Box`, `Button`, `CardActivity`, `DetailTransactionValue`, `SeparatorHorizontal`, `TagLabel`, `Text`
  - Features: Order number, status, payment type, shipping/value info, marketplace vendor details with item list, delivery tracker alert

#### **Educational** (1 screen)
- **/src/screens/LearnMoreRewardProgram/**
  - Purpose: FAQ/help content for rewards program
  - DS Components: `Box`, `BoxSafeArea`
  - Features: Collapsible FAQ content, safe area padding for notches

---

### 2. DS COMPONENTS USAGE SUMMARY

**Most Frequently Used Components:**
- `Box` - Layout primitive (13/11 screens) - universal container
- `Text` - Typography (all screens) - labels, descriptions, headings
- `Button` - CTA (8/11 screens) - primary interactions
- `SeparatorHorizontal` - Dividers (6/11 screens) - visual separation

**Medium Usage:**
- `BackDropBottom` - Bottom sheets (4/11 screens) - modals with Modalize
- `CardActivity` - Activity card (4/11 screens) - list items with actions
- `Alert` - Info boxes (3/11 screens) - highlights, warnings, errors
- `InputBox` - Form inputs (2/11 screens) - cashback data entry
- `Icon` - Icons (3/11 screens) - visual indicators
- `ListTextIcon` - Bulleted lists (3/11 screens) - numbered explanations
- `DetailTransactionValue` - Transaction display (2/11 screens) - points + value

**Lower Usage:**
- `CardPoints` - Points card (2/11 screens) - balance display
- `CardMiddle` - Grid cards (1/11 screens) - "where to use" grid
- `CardVehicleTags` - Vehicle cards (1/11 screens) - order cards
- `SearchUsed` - Search bar (1/11 screens) - extract search
- `Tabs` - Tab navigation (1/11 screens) - transaction filters
- `ListCardTransition` - Transaction list (1/11 screens) - animated transitions
- `TagLabel` - Status tags (2/11 screens) - status indicators
- `Loading` / `LoadingFooter` - Skeleton/spinners (3/11 screens) - loading states
- `Image` - Images (1/11 screens) - empty state illustrations
- `BoxSafeArea` - Safe area (1/11 screens) - notch handling

---

### 3. CATEGORIZATION BY FEATURE DOMAIN

**POINTS BALANCE:**
- Points (primary screen)
- PointsDetail (transaction detail)
- ExtractRewardProgram (transaction history)

**VOUCHERS/REDEMPTIONS:**
- InvoiceCashbackOnboarding
- InvoiceCashbackPoints
- InvoiceCashbackSummary
- RewardProgramMarketplace
- AirlineMilesMarketplace

**CASHBACK:**
- InvoiceCashbackPoints (intake)
- InvoiceCashbackSummary (confirmation)
- MyOrdersDetails (order with cashback info)

**MARKETPLACE:**
- RewardProgramMarketplace (generic marketplace)
- AirlineMilesMarketplace (airline partner)

**ORDERS/FULFILLMENT:**
- MyOrdersRewardProgram (order list)
- MyOrdersDetails (order detail with fulfillment)

**ONBOARDING/EDUCATION:**
- InvoiceCashbackOnboarding
- LearnMoreRewardProgram

---

### 4. STORYBOOK CONFIGURATION SUMMARY

**Framework:** @storybook/react-native-web-vite
**Addons:** @storybook/addon-essentials only
**Custom Plugins (in .storybook/main.ts):**
1. `jsxInJsPlugin()` - Transpiles JSX in .js files from packages like @semparar/design-system-app
2. `dtsStubPlugin()` - Intercepts .d.ts imports and creates stub exports to avoid resolution errors
3. `circularFixPlugin()` - Resolves circular dependency in CardOptionDrag/view.group
4. `cjsToEsmPlugin()` - Converts CommonJS module.exports to ES6 exports

**Module Aliases:**
- `~/` → src/
- `~/store` → .storybook/mocks/store.ts
- React Native modules mocked: LinearGradient, Modalize, SkeletonPlaceholder, Slider, Lottie, Video, AssetRegistry

**Decorator:** ThemeProvider wrapping all stories

---

### 5. STORYBOOK STORIES INVENTORY (7 story files)

#### **Validation & Smoke Tests** (2 stories)

**DSComponentValidation.stories.tsx** — SP_0001.1
- Purpose: Validates 10 DS components used in voucher screens
- Status: 8/10 render on web (BackDropBottom & Loading require native)
- Components tested: Text, Button, Box, InputBox, Alert, Icon, ListTextIcon, SeparatorHorizontal, BackDropBottom, Loading
- Story: `Validation/DS Components > AllComponents`

**SmokeTest.stories.tsx**
- Purpose: Basic sanity check that DS components load in Storybook
- Story: `SmokeTest/DS Components > Default`

#### **SDUI Implementation** (5 stories)

**SDUIInterpolation.stories.tsx** — SP_0002.1
- Purpose: Validates {{var}} interpolation engine
- Functions tested: `resolveContextPath()`, `interpolateString()`, `interpolateDeep()`
- Context: Product (abastecimento) + balance (25.720 points, R$ 7.716,00)
- Story: `SDUI/Interpolation > Demo`

**SDUIScreenRenderer.stories.tsx** — SP_0002.2
- Purpose: Validates full screen rendering from JSON with registry
- Demo adapters: heading, text, balance_display, button, link, separator, nav_header
- Unknown type fallback: Shows placeholder for unknown components
- Story: `SDUI/ScreenRenderer > Demo`

**SDUIAdapters.stories.tsx** — SP_0002.3
- Purpose: All 11 component adapters rendering with full interpolation
- Adapters: heading, balance_display, points_input, separator, text, alert, section_heading, list_text_icon, icon_text_row, link, button
- Story: `SDUI/Component Adapters > AllAdapters`

**SDUIMockPayloads.stories.tsx** — SP_0002.4
- Purpose: Validates 4 screens × 2 products (8 payloads total)
- Screens: Form, Summary, Conclusion, Rules
- Products: Abastecimento, Estacionamento
- Interactive: Dropdown to select screen
- Story: `SDUI/MockPayloads > Demo`

**SDUIDemoVoucher.stories.tsx** — SP_0002.5
- Purpose: Full end-to-end voucher flow with product toggle
- Demonstrates SDUI reusability: same ScreenRenderer + adapters, different JSON payloads
- Payloads: 8 total (4 screens × 2 products)
- Stories (5):
  - `SDUI/VoucherDemo > Form` - Form screen with product toggle
  - `SDUI/VoucherDemo > Summary` - Review screen with product toggle
  - `SDUI/VoucherDemo > Conclusion` - Success/failure screens with product toggle
  - `SDUI/VoucherDemo > Rules` - Terms/rules with product toggle
  - `SDUI/VoucherDemo > FullFlow` - Complete 4-step flow with step + product toggles

---

### 6. STORYBOOK COVERAGE MATRIX

| Domain | Screen | Existing Story | Gap |
|--------|--------|---------------|----|
| Points | Points | ❌ | No screen story |
| Points | PointsDetail | ❌ | No screen story |
| Points | ExtractRewardProgram | ❌ | No screen story |
| Cashback | InvoiceCashbackOnboarding | ❌ | No screen story |
| Cashback | InvoiceCashbackPoints | ✅ Implicit (SDUIMockPayloads, SDUIAdapters, SDUIDemoVoucher) | Partial via SDUI |
| Cashback | InvoiceCashbackSummary | ✅ Implicit (SDUIMockPayloads, SDUIDemoVoucher) | Partial via SDUI |
| Marketplace | RewardProgramMarketplace | ❌ | No screen story |
| Marketplace | AirlineMilesMarketplace | ❌ | No screen story |
| Orders | MyOrdersRewardProgram | ❌ | No screen story |
| Orders | MyOrdersDetails | ❌ | No screen story |
| Education | LearnMoreRewardProgram | ❌ | No screen story |
| **SDUI** | **Adapters** | ✅ | Full coverage (SP_0002.1-5) |
| **Validation** | **DS Components** | ✅ | Full coverage (SP_0001.1) |

---

### 7. KEY INSIGHTS

**Coverage Status:**
- **Direct Screen Stories:** 0/11 (0% coverage of actual screens)
- **SDUI Stories:** 5/7 stories are SDUI-focused (validating the new server-driven approach)
- **DS Component Stories:** 2/7 stories validate design system components
- **Active Development Focus:** SDUI proof-of-concept fully implemented; traditional screen stories not yet added

**SDUI Maturity:**
- Interpolation engine: Fully functional (SP_0002.1)
- Component registry: Implemented (SP_0002.2)
- 11 adapters: Bridging SDUI → DS (SP_0002.3)
- 8 mock payloads: 4 screen types × 2 products (SP_0002.4)
- Full reusability proof: Single ScreenRenderer renders all permutations (SP_0002.5)

**Storybook Limitations Documented:**
- BackDropBottom (Modalize) = requires native modules, web fallback needed
- Loading (Lottie) = requires native Lottie bindings, web fallback needed
- 8/10 DS components render successfully on web

**Addon Configuration:**
- Minimal (essentials only) for simplicity and performance
- Custom Vite plugins handle complex module resolution issues
- No custom addons (controls, interactions, accessibility, etc.)

---

This completes the full inventory of all 11 screens, their DS component usage, complete Storybook story catalog, and coverage analysis.
